TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == šłĖÁēĆŤá™ÁĒĪśó•O lihadayay lomi'ad no hekal == O lihadalay lomi'ad no hekal a sanay a sowal i, i 'ayaw a sowal i olanan tora 123lihadayay lomi'ad saan, nawhani itini i sakacecay a folad to 23 a lomi'adanan ami palowad, o tatapangan haw i, ora pikiningan tora Conghoamingko i tira i 1954 .01.23 a lomi'ad a folad ato mihecaan, to kafafolaw itini i Koliya a Ciwkoku ato Padaka Amilika maraholiway a holam tayniay i Taywan tora miihangay to Kiwsanto a tamdaw, hapapolong to kakokoka ami kining toya lomi'ad, sanaw "o lihadayay lomi'ad no hekal" haan. O pinangan nira.ŤÉĆśôĮ Itini i 1950.6 folad a mihecaan, toya misalingato ama fafolaw kola Koliya a kanatar, saka 10 a folad(10śúą) mikihatiaay ko Ciwkoko holam a patayla to 30 polo' a sofitay ami folaw, yasato toya no kapapolongan a sofitay i, Caay pakafilo ami folaw sanaw talalikol to, 11/26 toya folad a lomi'ad i, tangasa i 12 a folad, naitini i Pinlang a talalikol, 1951.10 a folad toya mihecaan, itini i Panmentien hananay ama sasowasowal a patelep to kakafolaw. Yasato toya malepelay no kapapolongan a kanatal a sofitay i, milongoc ko Ciwkoku to sakapatatikol to polong sofitay a patikol ami nokay, ano caay to kakayhi ano makayhiay to, nikaolila caay paca'of ko kapapolongan a kakukoka, sanaw itini i 1952 a mihecaan to saka tosa a folad i, o kasasowasowal no polongan a kanatal a sofitay, caay pihayda to longoc no Ciwkoku , oya-malepelay no sakapapolongan a kanatal a sofitay i pakaalaay to 17 a ^emangan, ilaay ko 10 a ^emangan i, caay ka kayhi ami nokay a patalalikol, itini i tosaay a ^emangan i, caay ka pacici aminokay i, pakaalaay to cecay a ^emang ira ko 'enem a 'esingan, opolong omaleplay a sofitay no Ciwkuko i ma^deng 173,700 tamdawan, o so'linay a tada sofitay nara i 21,300 a tamdawan, o sa'ayaway a sofitay i 600 a tamdawan, dodosato to faleday i 30 a tamdawan, midodo sato faled i 5 a tamdawan, safaleday to i 1 a tamdawan, itiniay i Ciciy hananay a niyalo' ama lofo. 1953.6 a folad to mihecan, itiniay i Fosan hananay no Koliya a niyalo' tomalofoay a sofitay to 14,200 a tamdawan i, pasadak to codad ami ihang to Kiwsanto , milogoc tosaka sadakaw mangalay a tayni i Taywan ami comod i Conghaminko a sofitay, likorsato mahelek tokasasowal, calasato ko citodongay, nikaolira o Into a kanatal koci-todongay ami hapinang ami laheci to demak. Halateng sakola Ciwkokay a tamdaw i, hai:to o Intocing ko citodongay ami hapinang to demak, nikaolira, ora toya no kapolongan asa'opo to lomaloma a kanatal koci todongay ami hapinang ato misakilac to demak, todongay toma'osiay to Kiwsanto osanay a demak, itini i kala-loodlood no kiwsanto ato Conghoaminko haw i, so'ling adihayay koma'osiay ami nokay a tayra i Congkou , sanaw magalay cangra a tayra i Taywan o sanay, likosato o taniay i Taywan toya mihecaan i polong sofitay 14,235 a tamdawan, ominokayay sato a tayla i Congkou a tamdaw i, sowalsa iraay ko makali'angay ato mapadesay, alatek likolsato iraay ko kinapatayay saan ko tengil. O tayniay i Taywan a sofitay i, adihay komi padangay i cangraan, ano nailomaay a kanatal a sa'opo ato icowacowaay i, mahecaday to ko faloco' ami hamham i cangraan, o tayniay i Taywan amaraholiway i, toloay ama tatoortoor a tangasa i Kilong osa'ayaway i, itiniay i 1954.01.23 a tangasa, toyasa alomi'ad 'alomanay a tamdaw tayla i Kilong ami hamham tokatangasa nangra, dodosato taniay haca i Tayhok ami pahapinang to olah nangra ami hamham, mafana' toko icowacowaay a karo niyaro' i, polong sato ami kingking tota kingkingan, iraay ko tosa polo' ira ko tolo ami kingking to ta kingkingan, sanaw itiyaay ami salingato ami pahapingang totodongay itira i sakacecay a folad to tosa polo' ira ko tolo a lomi'adan to pikining tora 123kahodayan hananay a lomi'ad, tosa pikiningaw tora minokayay a mara holiway nai Koliya , itiyaay ami longoc to polong no hekal ami kihatiya ami kining to lipahak no faloco', itini sato i 1954 amihecaan i, itini sato i Pongfo Makong ami palowad to lihadayay hananay a talo'an. Olanan sanay a Conghawminko a sayfo i, misanga' tora "123lihadayay lomi'ad" hananay topi kining nangra toka pasadak to sofitay nai Koliya , dodosato taniay i Tayko Mongko ami palowad tohatiniay a demak, olanan sato tora panokayay nai Koliya a sofitay a tamdaw i, likor sato ora sayfo sato no Taywan kocitodongay ami dipod to'orip nangra, irako talaay i pitilidan ami tiliday, iraay ko tayraay i sofitay ama lahitay, ato tayraay i katayalan ama tayal. Salikolay to nawhani halafin to awaay ko fodfod ato lawlaw to kanatal, caay to kamatiya i'ayaw ami kining tora lomi'ad, malasawad toko kasasi'adad to i Tayliokay a kanatal, ora sato tora Kiwsato hananay i, hato o mamalasawad to, sanaw ora sa to pikining tora "123 lahodayay lomi'ad" hananay a demak i, itini i 1993 amihecaan mifalic to a pala ono "hekalan a lihadayay hananay a lomi'ad". Satohaw i o i Taywanay a nano malaholiway taylaay to i Tayliok ama tayal ato palowad to tayal, mahemk toko i Tayliokay ami hamham, malecad tora ci Changcenghen hananay a tamdaw o hatilaay to ama hamham nangra.(Suman siwkolan 'Amis/Pancah 1/23'25) Tahapinangang 2009-02-28) (šł≠śĖá ). 4. Foreign Relations of the United States, 1952-1954 Volume XV, Part 2, Korea. . Document 857 (2013-10-29). (ŚéüŚßčŚÖßŚģĻŚ≠ėś™ĒśĖľ2019-05-14).

…ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ saan, nawńßani itini i saka ¶…ô ¶aj a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ to~u ** a …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģanan ami pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ, o~u tatapaŇčan ńßaw i, o~ura pikiniŇčan to~ura ¶o~uŇčńßo~uamiŇčko~u i tira i **** .**.** a …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ato~u mińß…ô ¶aan, to~u kafafo~u…ĺaw itini i ko~u…ĺija a ¶iwko~uko~u~u ato~u pa…¨~…ģaka ami…ĺika marańßo~u…ĺiwaj a ńßo~u…ĺam tajniaj i tajwan to~ura miińßaŇčaj °o~upo~u ato~u i ¶o~uwa ¶o~uwaaj i, mańß…ô ¶a…¨~…ģaj to~u ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ami ńßamńßam i ¶aŇčraan, o~u tajniaj i tajwan amarańßo~u…ĺiwaj i, to~u…ĺo~uaj ama tato~uo~urto~uo~ur a taŇčasa i ki…ĺo~uŇč o~usa °ajawaj i, itiniaj i ****.**.** a taŇčasa, to~ujasa a…ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ °a…ĺo~umanaj a tam…¨~…ģaw taj…ĺa i ki…ĺo~uŇč ami ńßamńßam to~ukataŇčasa naŇčra, …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~usato~u taniaj ńßa ¶a i tajńßo~uk ami pańßapinaŇč to~u o~u…ĺańß naŇčra ami ńßamńßam, mafana ° to~uko~u i ¶o~uwa ¶o~uwaaj a karo~u nijaro~u ° i, po~u…ĺo~uŇč sato~u ami kiŇčkiŇč to~uta kiŇčkiŇčan, iraaj ko~u to~usa po~u…ĺo~u ° ira ko~u to~u…ĺo~u ami kiŇčkiŇč to~u ta kiŇčkiŇčan, sanaw itijaaj ami sa…ĺiŇčato~u ami pańßapiŇčaŇč to~uto~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj itira i saka ¶…ô ¶aj a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ to~u to~usa po~u…ĺo~u ° ira ko~u to~u…ĺo~u a …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģan to~u pikiniŇč to~ura ***kańßo~u…¨~…ģajan ńßananaj a …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ, to~usa pikiniŇčaw to~ura mino~ukajaj a mara ńßo~u…ĺiwaj nai ko~u…ĺija , itijaaj ami …ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ to~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ ami kińßatija ami kiniŇč to~u …ĺipańßak no~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °, itini sato~u i **** amińß…ô ¶aan i, itini sato~u i po~uŇčfo~u mako~uŇč ami pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u …ĺińßa…¨~…ģajaj ńßananaj a ta…ĺo~u °an. o~u…ĺanan sanaj a ¶o~uŇčńßawminko~u a sajfo~u i, misaŇča ° to~ura "***…ĺińßa…¨~…ģajaj …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ" ńßananaj to~upi kiniŇč naŇčra to~uka pasa…¨~…ģak to~u so~ufitaj nai ko~u…ĺija , …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~usato~u taniaj i tajko~u mo~uŇčko~u ami pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~uńßatiniaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak, o~u…ĺanan sato~u to~ura pano~ukajaj nai ko~u…ĺija a so~ufitaj a tam…¨~…ģaw i, …ĺiko~ur sato~u o~ura sajfo~u sato~u no~u tajwan ko~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj ami …¨~…ģipo~u…¨~…ģ to~u °o~urip naŇčra, irako~u ta…ĺaaj i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan ami ti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj, iraaj ko~u tajraaj i so~ufitaj ama …ĺańßitaj, ato~u tajraaj i kataja…ĺan ama taja…ĺ. sa…ĺiko~u…ĺaj to~u nawńßani ńßa…ĺafin to~u awaaj ko~u fo~u…¨~…ģfo~u…¨~…ģ ato~u …ĺaw…ĺaw to~u kanata…ĺ, ¶aaj to~u kamatija i °ajaw ami kiniŇč to~ura …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ, ma…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ to~uko~u kasasi °a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ to~u i taj…ĺio~ukaj a kanata…ĺ, o~ura sato~u to~ura kiwsato~u ńßananaj i, ńßato~u o~u mama…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ to~u, sanaw o~ura sa to~u pikiniŇč to~ura "*** …ĺańßo~u…¨~…ģajaj …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ" ńßananaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak i, itini i **** amińß…ô ¶aan mifa…ĺi ¶ to~u a pa…ĺa o~uno~u "ńß…ôka…ĺan a …ĺińßa…¨~…ģajaj ńßananaj a …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ". sato~uńßaw i o~u i tajwanaj a nano~u ma…ĺańßo~u…ĺiwaj taj…ĺaaj to~u i taj…ĺio~uk ama taja…ĺ ato~u pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u taja…ĺ, mańß…ômk to~uko~u i taj…ĺio~ukaj ami ńßamńßam, ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~ura ¶i ¶ńßaŇč ¶…ôŇčńß…ôn ńßananaj a tam…¨~…ģaw o~u ńßati…ĺaaj to~u ama ńßamńßam naŇčra.(so~u~uman siwko~u…ĺan °amis/pan ¶ańß */** °**) tańßapinaŇčaŇč ****-**-**) (** ). *. fo~ur…ôi*n r…ô…ĺatio~uns o~uf tńß…ô o~u~unit…ô…¨~…ģ stat…ôs, ****-**** b~vo~u…ĺo~u~um…ô xb~v, part *, ko~ur…ôa. . …¨~…ģo~u ¶o~u~um…ônt *** (****-**-**). (***********-**-**).
S.FORM: == šłĖÁēĆŤá™ÁĒĪśó•O lihadayay lomi'ad no hekal == O lihadalay lomi'ad no hekal a sanay a sowal i, i 'ayaw a sowal i olanan tora 123lihadayay lomi'ad saan, nawhani itini i sakacecay a folad to 23 a lomi'adanan ami palowad, o tatapangan haw i, ora pikiningan tora Conghoamingko i tira i 1954 .01.23 a lomi'ad a folad ato mihecaan, to kafafolaw itini i Koliya a Ciwkoku ato Padaka Amilika maraholiway a holam tayniay i Taywan tora miihangay to Kiwsanto a tamdaw, hapapolong to kakokoka ami kining toya lomi'ad, sanaw "o lihadayay lomi'ad no hekal" haan. O pinangan nira.ŤÉĆśôĮ Itini i 1950.6 folad a mihecaan, toya misalingato ama fafolaw kola Koliya a kanatar, saka 10 a folad(10śúą) mikihatiaay ko Ciwkoko holam a patayla to 30 polo' a sofitay ami folaw, yasato toya no kapapolongan a sofitay i, Caay pakafilo ami folaw sanaw talalikol to, 11/26 toya folad a lomi'ad i, tangasa i 12 a folad, naitini i Pinlang a talalikol, 1951.10 a folad toya mihecaan, itini i Panmentien hananay ama sasowasowal a patelep to kakafolaw. Yasato toya malepelay no kapapolongan a kanatal a sofitay i, milongoc ko Ciwkoku to sakapatatikol to polong sofitay a patikol ami nokay, ano caay to kakayhi ano makayhiay to, nikaolila caay paca'of ko kapapolongan a kakukoka, sanaw itini i 1952 a mihecaan to saka tosa a folad i, o kasasowasowal no polongan a kanatal a sofitay, caay pihayda to longoc no Ciwkoku , oya-malepelay no sakapapolongan a kanatal a sofitay i pakaalaay to 17 a ^emangan, ilaay ko 10 a ^emangan i, caay ka kayhi ami nokay a patalalikol, itini i tosaay a ^emangan i, caay ka pacici aminokay i, pakaalaay to cecay a ^emang ira ko 'enem a 'esingan, opolong omaleplay a sofitay no Ciwkuko i ma^deng 173,700 tamdawan, o so'linay a tada sofitay nara i 21,300 a tamdawan, o sa'ayaway a sofitay i 600 a tamdawan, dodosato to faleday i 30 a tamdawan, midodo sato faled i 5 a tamdawan, safaleday to i 1 a tamdawan, itiniay i Ciciy hananay a niyalo' ama lofo. 1953.6 a folad to mihecan, itiniay i Fosan hananay no Koliya a niyalo' tomalofoay a sofitay to 14,200 a tamdawan i, pasadak to codad ami ihang to Kiwsanto , milogoc tosaka sadakaw mangalay a tayni i Taywan ami comod i Conghaminko a sofitay, likorsato mahelek tokasasowal, calasato ko citodongay, nikaolira o Into a kanatal koci-todongay ami hapinang ami laheci to demak. Halateng sakola Ciwkokay a tamdaw i, hai:to o Intocing ko citodongay ami hapinang to demak, nikaolira, ora toya no kapolongan asa'opo to lomaloma a kanatal koci todongay ami hapinang ato misakilac to demak, todongay toma'osiay to Kiwsanto osanay a demak, itini i kala-loodlood no kiwsanto ato Conghoaminko haw i, so'ling adihayay koma'osiay ami nokay a tayra i Congkou , sanaw magalay cangra a tayra i Taywan o sanay, likosato o taniay i Taywan toya mihecaan i polong sofitay 14,235 a tamdawan, ominokayay sato a tayla i Congkou a tamdaw i, sowalsa iraay ko makali'angay ato mapadesay, alatek likolsato iraay ko kinapatayay saan ko tengil. O tayniay i Taywan a sofitay i, adihay komi padangay i cangraan, ano nailomaay a kanatal a sa'opo ato icowacowaay i, mahecaday to ko faloco' ami hamham i cangraan, o tayniay i Taywan amaraholiway i, toloay ama tatoortoor a tangasa i Kilong osa'ayaway i, itiniay i 1954.01.23 a tangasa, toyasa alomi'ad 'alomanay a tamdaw tayla i Kilong ami hamham tokatangasa nangra, dodosato taniay haca i Tayhok ami pahapinang to olah nangra ami hamham, mafana' toko icowacowaay a karo niyaro' i, polong sato ami kingking tota kingkingan, iraay ko tosa polo' ira ko tolo ami kingking to ta kingkingan, sanaw itiyaay ami salingato ami pahapingang totodongay itira i sakacecay a folad to tosa polo' ira ko tolo a lomi'adan to pikining tora 123kahodayan hananay a lomi'ad, tosa pikiningaw tora minokayay a mara holiway nai Koliya , itiyaay ami longoc to polong no hekal ami kihatiya ami kining to lipahak no faloco', itini sato i 1954 amihecaan i, itini sato i Pongfo Makong ami palowad to lihadayay hananay a talo'an. Olanan sanay a Conghawminko a sayfo i, misanga' tora "123lihadayay lomi'ad" hananay topi kining nangra toka pasadak to sofitay nai Koliya , dodosato taniay i Tayko Mongko ami palowad tohatiniay a demak, olanan sato tora panokayay nai Koliya a sofitay a tamdaw i, likor sato ora sayfo sato no Taywan kocitodongay ami dipod to'orip nangra, irako talaay i pitilidan ami tiliday, iraay ko tayraay i sofitay ama lahitay, ato tayraay i katayalan ama tayal. Salikolay to nawhani halafin to awaay ko fodfod ato lawlaw to kanatal, caay to kamatiya i'ayaw ami kining tora lomi'ad, malasawad toko kasasi'adad to i Tayliokay a kanatal, ora sato tora Kiwsato hananay i, hato o mamalasawad to, sanaw ora sa to pikining tora "123 lahodayay lomi'ad" hananay a demak i, itini i 1993 amihecaan mifalic to a pala ono "hekalan a lihadayay hananay a lomi'ad". Satohaw i o i Taywanay a nano malaholiway taylaay to i Tayliok ama tayal ato palowad to tayal, mahemk toko i Tayliokay ami hamham, malecad tora ci Changcenghen hananay a tamdaw o hatilaay to ama hamham nangra.(Suman siwkolan 'Amis/Pancah 1/23'25) Tahapinangang 2009-02-28) (šł≠śĖá ). 4. Foreign Relations of the United States, 1952-1954 Volume XV, Part 2, Korea. . Document 857 (2013-10-29). (ŚéüŚßčŚÖßŚģĻŚ≠ėś™ĒśĖľ2019-05-14).

…ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ saan, nawńßani itini i saka ¶…ô ¶aj a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ to~u ** a …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģanan ami pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ, o~u tatapaŇčan ńßaw i, o~ura pikiniŇčan to~ura ¶o~uŇčńßo~uamiŇčko~u i tira i **** tajńßo~uk ami pańßapinaŇč to~u o~u…ĺańß naŇčra ami ńßamńßam, mafana ° to~uko~u i ¶o~uwa ¶o~uwaaj a karo~u nijaro~u ° i, po~u…ĺo~uŇč sato~u ami kiŇčkiŇč to~uta kiŇčkiŇčan, iraaj ko~u to~usa po~u…ĺo~u ° a …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģan to~u pikiniŇč to~ura ***kańßo~u…¨~…ģajan ńßananaj a …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ, to~usa pikiniŇčaw to~ura mino~ukajaj a mara ńßo~u…ĺiwaj nai ko~u…ĺija , itijaaj ami …ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ to~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ ami kińßatija ami kiniŇč to~u …ĺipańßak no~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °, itini sato~u i **** amińß…ô ¶aan i, itini sato~u i po~uŇčfo~u mako~uŇč ami pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u …ĺińßa…¨~…ģajaj ńßananaj a ta…ĺo~u °an. o~u…ĺanan sanaj a ¶o~uŇčńßawminko~u a sajfo~u i, misaŇča ° to~ura "***…ĺińßa…¨~…ģajaj …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ" ńßananaj to~upi kiniŇč naŇčra to~uka pasa…¨~…ģak to~u so~ufitaj nai ko~u…ĺija , …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~usato~u taniaj i tajko~u mo~uŇčko~u ami pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~uńßatiniaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak, o~u…ĺanan sato~u to~ura pano~ukajaj nai ko~u…ĺija a so~ufitaj a tam…¨~…ģaw i, …ĺiko~ur sato~u o~ura sajfo~u sato~u no~u tajwan ko~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj ami …¨~…ģipo~u…¨~…ģ to~u °o~urip naŇčra, irako~u ta…ĺaaj i piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan ami ti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj, iraaj ko~u tajraaj i so~ufitaj ama …ĺańßitaj, ato~u tajraaj i kataja…ĺan ama taja…ĺ. sa…ĺiko~u…ĺaj to~u nawńßani ńßa…ĺafin to~u awaaj ko~u fo~u…¨~…ģfo~u…¨~…ģ ato~u …ĺaw…ĺaw to~u kanata…ĺ, ¶aaj to~u kamatija i °ajaw ami kiniŇč to~ura …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ, ma…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ to~uko~u kasasi °a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ to~u i taj…ĺio~ukaj a kanata…ĺ, o~ura sato~u to~ura kiwsato~u ńßananaj i, ńßato~u o~u mama…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ to~u, sanaw o~ura sa to~u pikiniŇč to~ura "*** …ĺańßo~u…¨~…ģajaj …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ" ńßananaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak i, itini i **** amińß…ô ¶aan mifa…ĺi ¶ to~u a pa…ĺa o~uno~u "ńß…ôka…ĺan a …ĺińßa…¨~…ģajaj ńßananaj a …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ". sato~uńßaw i o~u i tajwanaj a nano~u ma…ĺańßo~u…ĺiwaj taj…ĺaaj to~u i taj…ĺio~uk ama taja…ĺ ato~u pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u taja…ĺ, mańß…ômk to~uko~u i taj…ĺio~ukaj ami ńßamńßam, ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~ura ¶i ¶ńßaŇč ¶…ôŇčńß…ôn ńßananaj a tam…¨~…ģaw o~u ńßati…ĺaaj to~u ama ńßamńßam naŇčra.(so~u~uman siwko~u…ĺan °amis/pan ¶ańß */** °**) tańßapinaŇčaŇč ****-**-**) (** ). *. fo~ur…ôi*n r…ô…ĺatio~uns o~uf tńß…ô o~u~unit…ô…¨~…ģ stat…ôs, ****-**** b~vo~u…ĺo~u~um…ô xb~v, part *, ko~ur…ôa. . …¨~…ģo~u ¶o~u~um…ônt *** (****-**-**).
